properties.summary: Reported security incident at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. No casualties reported.

properties.event_title: Austin, Texas: Mass shooting at Buford's on West 6th Street
properties.summary: Mass shooting in Austin resulting in multiple fatalities and injuries. Suspect was shot by police at the scene.

properties.event_title: Boulder City, Nevada: Power Substation Event
properties.summary: On February 19, 2026, a driver rammed a vehicle through the gate of a power substation in Boulder City, Nevada, in an incident being investigated as possible terrorism, and was later found dead from a self-inflicted gunshot wound. Authorities identified him as 23-year-old Dawson Maloney and reported finding extremist-related materials and explosive components in his possession.
